documents_not_reviewed.reason: Not provided. Required for modality-specific rules (ADC, oligo, peptide, gene therapy, vaccine) and pediatric timing.

documents_not_reviewed.name: FDA/EMA regional guidance
documents_not_reviewed.reason: Not ICH documents; not provided. Required for regional_differences section.

rule_counts.notes: Rule count is an estimate; the file uses nested objects and arrays rather than a flat numbered list. 'Rules' here means discrete verifiable claims (endpoint lists, timing thresholds, study requirements, criteria lists). Partially verified = claim is consistent with available sources but not directly quoted. Needing human review = source document not available OR rule depends on M3(R2)/regional guidance not provided.

changes_summary.corr_001_note: CORR-001 applies to nonclinical-requirements.json (genotoxicity timing), not safety-pharmacology-rules.json. Not applied here.
changes_summary.corr_002_note: CORR-002 applies to S1A carcinogenicity timing in nonclinical-requirements.json, not safety-pharmacology-rules.json. Not applied here.

before_verification.notes: The original file had high surface accuracy — rules were correctly stated in substance. Main issues were: (1) one factual omission (plasma proteins); (2) four incorrect source attributions (hERG best practices, safety margin formula, mAb TQT waiver, novel approaches attributed to original S7B when they are from 2022 Q&As).

after_verification.notes: All verified rules are now confirmed accurate or corrected. Unverifiable rules are flagged rather than guessed. The 100% figure applies only to the 111 verified/partially-verified rules. The 31 flagged rules have unknown accuracy pending human review with M3(R2), regional, and product-specific guidance documents.

key_findings.finding: Plasma proteins omission in renal endpoints
key_findings.details: S7A Section 2.8.2.1 verbatim includes 'plasma proteins' alongside BUN and creatinine. Original rules file omitted this endpoint. Fixed in CHG-001.

key_findings.finding: hERG temperature/frequency parameters postdate S7B by 17 years
key_findings.details: 35-37°C and 0.2-1 Hz are from E14/S7B Q&A 2.1 (2022). Original S7B (2005) does not contain these parameters. Source attribution error corrected in CHG-002 (CORR-003).

key_findings.finding: Safety margin formula is a Q&A contribution, not S7B original
key_findings.details: Free IC50 / free Cmax,ss formula and 1% protein binding floor are from Q&A 1.2 (2022). S7B Section 2.2 is conceptual only. Corrected in CHG-003 (CORR-004).

key_findings.finding: mAb TQT waiver source is E14 Q&A 6.3 not S7B
key_findings.details: The formalized mAb TQT waiver criteria are in E14 Q&A 6.3 (March 2014). Corrected in CHG-004 (CORR-005).

key_findings.finding: hiPSC-CM and in silico models are Q&A/IWG contributions, not S7B original
key_findings.details: S7B Section 3.1.4 only generically encourages novel model development. Named approaches (hiPSC-CM, CiPA in silico) are from Q&As 2022 and CiPA IWG. Corrected in CHG-005 (CORR-006).

key_findings.finding: Entire exploratory clinical trials section requires M3(R2) verification
key_findings.details: 5 exploratory approaches with specific dose/duration thresholds all cite M3(R2) Table 1. M3(R2) was not provided. Flagged NEEDS_HUMAN_REVIEW.

key_findings.finding: Q&A 4.1 lists 6 proarrhythmia model criteria; rules file lists 4
key_findings.details: All 4 listed are accurate and present in the Q&A's 6. Two criteria not listed: (5) concentration-dependent effect detection, (6) historical control data. Flagged as potential incompleteness.

recommendations.action: Verify exploratory_clinical_trials section against M3(R2) Table 1 (approaches 1-5)
recommendations.reason: 5 approaches with specific dose/duration thresholds affect first-in-human trial requirements

recommendations.action: Verify modality_considerations (ADC, oligonucleotide, peptide, gene therapy, vaccine) against ICH S6, S10, and applicable product-specific guidelines
recommendations.reason: These modalities represent growing development pipeline; errors could affect submission strategy

recommendations.action: Verify regional_differences section against FDA and EMA source guidance documents
recommendations.reason: Regional exceptions affect submission strategy but content may have become stale as ICH harmonization advances

recommendations.action: Complete proarrhythmia model qualification criteria with Q&A 4.1 criteria 5 and 6
recommendations.reason: Current list is accurate but incomplete; missing criteria could be practically important for model selection

recommendations.action: Read E14-S7B_IWG_Final_Concept_Paper_2024_0312_0.pdf to check for any 2024 updates not captured in 2022 Q&As
recommendations.reason: 2024 concept paper may contain emerging guidance that would add novel_approaches entries
